text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As it happens, I met with an oil tycoon<n>just earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
What in the world could T.M. Opera O<n>be talking
about this time? By now,<n>I'm used to her antics,
so I get<n>straight to asking for details.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, he was quite perturbed, that oil<n>tycoon.
Scouting me for his own<n>country, of all things!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My prestige appears to have<n>crossed vast
oceans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah... I was promised a life of luxury<n>should I race
in his country.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I refused, of course! The lap of luxury<n>is not what I
desire. I only hope for<n>my beauty to bring
happiness to the<n>world.

That's a scam if I've ever heard one,<n>but there's
no problem if she already<n>said no.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, just a few days later...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't the oil tycoon!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Out of the blue and flanked by<n>bodyguards, a man
who appears to<n>be this oil tycoon appears.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! I won't be turned away!<n>Your noble
presence will shine<n>brightest on my nation's
tracks!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oil Tycoon... That is impossible.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My radiance never dims, no matter<n>the distance!
Surely, deep down you<n>know this to be true!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, nevertheless! If you insist on<n>pursuing the
Overlord, then...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We shall have a contest, Oil<n>Tycoon—to remind you
of what lies at<n>the core of my beauty!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
A contest, you say? Very well! Lose,<n>and you will
accompany me back to<n>my country!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This offer she's impulsively made<n>goes far
beyond ridiculous. I have to<n>make sure she wins
somehow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! A contest of speed would<n>be unfair.
And an unfair contest is<n>anything but beautiful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, give us your<n>recommendation—and make it
splendid!
choice_data_list: How about a racing game instead?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! It's decided. Prepare<n>yourself, Oil
Tycoon!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O and the oil<n>tycoon's contest
begins at the<n>arcade.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The tycoon is surprisingly good at the<n>game. With
perfect technique right off<n>the bat, he calmly
cruises to what<n>looks like certain victory.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: But right before he crosses the finish<n>line...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You raced well, Oil Tycoon.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Argh! That move you pulled... Were<n>you holding
back until the end?

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Lulling me into false confidence... You<n>insult me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! You have it wrong!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Then why?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oil Tycoon... My brilliance is constant.<n>And at times,
it can be blinding to<n>some in the audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I conserve it until the last<n>possible instant, to
shine through like<n>rose petals dancing on the wind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That the thrilling climax may forever<n>be
remembered by my adoring fans!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
You... You were acting out of concern<n>for the
audience?

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
But the people here are few more<n>than my
bodyguards. You mean to<n>say this counts as an
audience?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Low attendance is no reason to<n>become careless.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My beauty brings joy to one and all.<n>Such is the
role of a king—and the<n>Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Hic... sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Your beauty rings true, Opera O. It's<n>no different
than the day I first<n>became your fan, watching you
run<n>across the monitor...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Oil Tycoon... I promise you<n>this—though we
reside in different<n>countries, my light will reach you
all<n>the same.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, without a chance for me to<n>butt in on their
wacky exchange, the<n>contest comes to its
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I come across a<n>headline in the
news... "The Oil<n>Tycoon's Secret Vacation."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Photography... Indeed, a ruler is<n>always being
viewed by the public!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! It's decided. Prepare<n>yourself, Oil
Tycoon!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
To ensure a fair contest, they decide<n>to use the
self-timer on their phones.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The oil tycoon sits down for all his<n>pictures. Sure,
his poses might lack<n>dynamism, but he makes up
for it in<n>grandeur and gravitas.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The sirens forget their song. Lost in<n>my beauty,
they weep!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Bells resound in chorus to celebrate<n>my brilliance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The swans of the lake sing songs of<n>my dazzling
presence!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She strikes one animated pose after<n>another, each
with someone in mind.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The selfie session ends, and they<n>each present
their best pictures. The<n>result is...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: I have lost, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Dear Oil Tycoon...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Your consideration for others makes<n>you shine all
the brighter in the eyes<n>of those who gaze upon
you!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Your life energy comes across in<n>every medium,
be it photo or video!<n>This... This...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
This is the feeling I had the very first<n>time I saw
you dashing across the<n>monitor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Enough. There is no need to speak<n>further. So long
as you understand,<n>that will suffice.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'll send you my pictures. After all, I<n>couldn't allow
a fan to return<n>empty-handed after traveling from
overseas just to see me.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Y-you chose this competition so that Imight have these souvenirs?! Myword... you are the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, without a chance for me to<n>butt in on their
wacky exchange, the<n>contest comes to its
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I come across a<n>headline in the
news... "The Oil<n>Tycoon's Secret Vacation."
